# Attio

> Attio is a modern CRM platform designed for tech-savvy professionals. Powerful, flexible, and intuitive — build meaningful relationships with your customers at scale.

## Pages

- [Homepage](/) — Main landing page with product overview, features, pricing, testimonials, and FAQ
- [Brand Guidelines](/brand) — Complete design system documentation including logo, colors, typography, spacing, and components

## Product Overview

Attio is a CRM that adapts to your process. It provides lightning-fast performance, full customization, real-time reporting, team collaboration, enterprise security, and an API-first platform.

## Key Features

- Lightning fast — Built for speed, every interaction feels instant
- Fully customizable — Custom objects, fields, and views built your way
- Real-time reporting — Live dashboards and analytics
- Team collaboration — Shared notes, mentions, and activity feeds
- Enterprise security — SOC 2 certified with SAML SSO, role-based access, and audit logs
- API-first platform — REST API and webhooks for integrations

## How It Works

1. Connect your data — Import from CSV, Salesforce, HubSpot, and more
2. Customize your workspace — Build custom objects, views, and automations
3. Close more deals — Real-time insights and automated follow-ups

## Pricing

- Free: $0 forever — Up to 1,000 contacts, basic reporting, email integration, mobile app
- Pro: $29/user/month — Unlimited contacts, advanced reporting, custom objects, API access, automations, priority support
- Enterprise: Custom pricing — SAML SSO, audit logs, dedicated CSM, custom SLA, advanced security

## FAQ

- Setup takes under 15 minutes
- Supports migration from Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, and other CRMs
- Free plan available, no credit card required
- All plans include email support; Pro gets priority support; Enterprise gets dedicated CSM

## Brand Identity

- Primary Color: #B5BDC9
- Accent Color: #202124
- Background: #FFFFFF
- Text: #1C1D1F
- Links: #505967
- Font: Inter (body & headings), JetBrains Mono (code)
- Spacing: 8px grid system
- Border Radius: 8px default, 10px buttons

## Full Design System

See [/llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt) for complete brand guidelines and design token specifications.
